name: EOA – Video Clip → Social Distribution
description: Triggered when Lincoln video pipeline outputs a new clip. Calls the EOA social posting API to distribute via Blotato to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

nodes.name: Lincoln Pipeline – Video Clip Ready
nodes.notes: Trigger from Lincoln video pipeline on clip export. Payload: { clip_id, title, description, video_url, thumbnail_url, duration_seconds, event_title, speaker_name, event_date, event_id }

nodes.name: Build Video Post Content
nodes.notes: Platforms: instagram (auto-routes to Reels), facebook. TikTok/YouTube require account IDs configured in blotato.ts BLOTATO_ACCOUNT_IDS once Blotato supports those platforms.

nodes.name: EOA API – Schedule Video Posts
nodes.notes: Video URL must be a public URL at post time. Recommended: Supabase Storage public bucket.

setupNotes: 1. Set EOA_APP_URL in N8N to the deployed app URL.
2. Set ADMIN_SECRET in N8N — must match ADMIN_SECRET in the Next.js app.
3. Configure Lincoln pipeline to POST to this workflow's webhook URL on clip export.
Lincoln payload must include: clip_id, title, description, video_url, event_title, speaker_name, event_id.
4. Video files must be publicly accessible at the video_url at post time.
Recommended: upload clips to Supabase Storage (public bucket) before triggering this workflow.
5. The Next.js app handles all Blotato credentials and formatting — no Blotato config needed in N8N.
6. To add TikTok/YouTube: extend BlotatoPlatform in src/lib/blotato.ts and add account IDs to BLOTATO_ACCOUNT_IDS in src/app/api/social/post/route.ts.
